# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432
